name: Revival of lapsed life insurance policy
description: User missed premium payments and policy lapsed — wants to revive

input.message: I missed paying my LIC term plan premium for 8 months and the policy has lapsed. I want to revive it. Is that possible and how do I do it?

notes: LIC revival: possible within 2 years from lapse date. Steps: Pay all arrears + interest (LIC charges 8-9% on outstanding premiums). For term plans: may require medical certificate if substantial lapse. For plans lapsed < 30 days = grace period (not lapsed). After 2 years = full reinstatement requires insurer approval + health declaration.
